events.label: assistant
events.text: Diagnosis written to `/app/answer.json`. Summary: micron gauge read 397 at isolation (t=0) and rose to 1318 at t=10 min — a nearly 4x rise, far exceeding acceptable decay-test criteria. This indicates an active leak and/or residual moisture/non-condensables in the system. The evacuation/brazing work fails inspection; system must not be charged until leak-checked, repaired (or re-evacuated for moisture), and retested.
